issues.description: Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. Card text says 'turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up' which is a cost/choice mechanic, not an effect action. This should be represented as a cost condition or removed from effects array.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action is completely absent from card text. No draw effect exists in the official card.
KO target should include 'maxCount':1 to match 'up to 1' in the text, and scope should reflect optional selection.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 6 or less.
